scripts.build:electron: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && mkdir -p dist/electron/assets && cp -f electron/assets/trayTemplate.png dist/electron/assets/trayTemplate.png && cp -f electron/assets/trayTemplate@2x.png dist/electron/assets/trayTemplate@2x.png
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:core && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.renderer.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.electron.json
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.dist:zip: npm run build && npm_config_electron_mirror=https://github.com/electron/electron/releases/download/ electron-builder --mac zip --publish never
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm_config_electron_mirror=https://github.com/electron/electron/releases/download/ electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never
